seo.description: Example homepage of the astro-i18n-keystatic-template, demonstrating all 11 sections. Customize this content via Keystatic or in this JSON file.

sections.headline: Build fast, multilingual websites
sections.subtitle: An Astro-based starter with CMS, design tokens, and SEO baseline.

sections.title: Modular architecture
sections.body: Build pages from reusable sections. Add, remove, or reorder without touching code.

items.question: Can I add languages?
items.answer: Yes — add a translation file in src/i18n/ and update astro.config.mjs.

children.text: Replace this text with your own intro.

sections.title: Contact
sections.description: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you soon.

sections.title: Ready to start?
sections.description: Run setup.sh and personalize your site in minutes.
